summary.zh: 新冠疫情打乱了赛历开局，随后维斯塔潘与红牛开启了新的统治周期；2022 年地面效应回归规则重塑了赛车设计，2025 年迈凯伦时隔十余年重返车手冠军之列。
summary.en: The pandemic disrupted the decade's opening, before Verstappen and Red Bull launched a new period of dominance; the 2022 ground-effect regulation reset reshaped car design, and McLaren returned to the drivers' championship in 2025 after more than a decade.
